The Siblings of Time.name: 时代的兄弟姐妹 The Siblings of Time
The Siblings of Time.description:
万神殿成员：Awanna、Dremira、Herst

阵营：N（LG、NG、CG、LN、N、CN）

领域：命运、知识、时代、守望

牧师法术：1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aEM2cttJ2eYcLssW]{Fleet Step}，3环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MNiT0dHol5fEcKlz]{Threefold Aspect}，5环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OdqM06M0wDUqZWiR]{Cast into Time}

偏好武器：闷棍

神圣能力：感知或魅力

神圣技能：通灵学

神圣泉源：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

关键典范：保护时间线的完整性，遵循来自时代同胞的神谕讯息，将你从过去学到的东西在当下付诸实践，以引向更好的未来

关键禁忌：使用时代魔法回到过去并改变事件，违抗或质疑时代同胞的命令，在未来重蹈过去的错误而不从中学习

Herst、Awanna与Dremira——三位时代同胞（目前最常以女性形态显现为三位时代姐妹）——守护时代旅行不被滥用，并试图引导时间线走向更好的可能性。作为万神殿崇拜时代同胞的凡人信徒往往也采取类似立场，如同他们的三位神祇那样监管时间线。时代同胞对该万神殿的追随者比对其他凡人更为信任，甚至有时比对他们各自的个别信徒更信任；他们有时会共同向这些万神殿信徒发送神谕讯息或委派需完成的任务。

Pantheon Members: Awanna, Dremira, Herst

Alignment: N (LG, NG, CG, LN, N, CN)

Domains: fate, knowledge, time, vigil

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aEM2cttJ2eYcLssW]{Fleet Step}, 3nd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MNiT0dHol5fEcKlz]{Threefold Aspect}, 5th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OdqM06M0wDUqZWiR]{Cast into Time}

Favored Weapon: sap

Divine Ability: Wisdom or Charisma

Divine Skill: Occultism

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: protect the integrity of the timeline, follow oracular messages from the Siblings of Time, put into practice in the present what you learned from the past to lead to a better future

Key Anathema: use time magic to go back in time and change events, disobey or question orders from the Siblings of Time, repeat your mistakes of the past in the future without learning from them

Herst, Awanna, and Dremira, the three Siblings of Time (currently appearing most often in feminine forms as the three Sisters of Time), guard against abuse of time travel and attempt to guide the timeline to better possibilities. Mortal worshippers of the Siblings of Time as a pantheon often take a similar stance, policing the timeline as their three deities do. The Siblings of Time trust followers of the pantheon somewhat more than other mortals and even at times more than their own individual worshippers, and they sometimes collectively send these pantheists oracular messages or quests to fulfill.

The Parents.name: 父母 The Parents
The Parents.description:
万神殿成员： Lilin、Tova

阵营： N（NG、N、NE）

领域： 自信、创造、家庭、知识

牧师法术： 1环： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xqmHD8JIjak15lRk]{Unseen Servant}，4环： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TUj8eugNqAvB1vVR]{Creation}，9环： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KPDHmmjJiw7PhTYF]{Resplendent Mansion}

偏好武器： 流星锤索

神圣能力： 智力或感知

神圣技能： 社会

神圣灌注： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

关键典范： 在根源与革新之间寻找平衡、创造能长久留存之物、为有争议的问题寻找折中方案 关键禁忌： 顽固固守并拒绝妥协、在没有任何重建计划的情况下拆毁、让天平向对自己有利的一端倾斜

Tova，“父亲”，与 Lilin，“母亲”，是最初的宇宙航行者；他们在与一群怪兽的生存战斗中发现了阿拉卡尔世界。Tova 带来严苛的秩序与律法，而 Lilin 煽动混沌与变化；但他们携手建造并创造新事物。“父母”万神殿（有时也会故作姿态，自称为整体的“平衡”万神殿）以同等程度崇拜二者，因此其祭司往往难以轻易融入 Tova 或 Lilin 各自的教团。

Pantheon Members: Lilin, Tova

Alignment: N (NG, N, NE)

Domains: confidence, creation, family, knowledge

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xqmHD8JIjak15lRk]{Unseen Servant}, 4th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TUj8eugNqAvB1vVR]{Creation}, 9th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KPDHmmjJiw7PhTYF]{Resplendent Mansion}

Favored Weapon: bola

Divine Ability: Intelligence or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Society

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: find balance between tradition and innovation, create something that lasts, find compromises to contentious problems Key Anathema: stubbornly entrench and refuse to compromise, tear down without any plan to rebuild, tip the scales in your own favor

Tova, the Father, and Lilin, the Mother, are the original cosmic voyagers who found the world of Alacar in a battle for survival against a horde of kaiju. While Tova brings strict order and laws and Lilin incites chaos and change, together they build and create new things. The pantheon of the Parents (which sometimes puts on airs and calls itself the pantheon of the Balance as a whole) worships the two in equal measure, leading to priests who don't fit in easily with either Tova's or Lilin's own.

圣色： 灰色与绿色

Alignment: CN (NG, CG, N, CN, NE, CE)

Temples: inns, gambling halls, thieves' guilds

Worshipperst: gamblers, thieves, spies, performers

Sacred Animal: spider

Sacred Colors: gray and green

Domains: freedom, luck, magic, trickery

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise}, 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}, 5th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BoA00y45uDlmou07]{Secret Chest}

Divine Ability: Dexterity or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Stealth

Divine Font: harm or heal

Sumaworo.description:

兄弟姐妹：Sewa 和 Jata

Alignment: LE (LE, NE, CE)

Siblings: Sewa and Jata

Temples: academies, secret places, bureaucratic offices

Worshipperst: politicians, warlords, merchants

Sacred Animal: viper

Sacred Colors: white and red

Domains: ambition, might, tyranny, secrets

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.X56VdA98VedAfGTU]{Thicket of Knives}, 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PRrZ7anETWPm90YY]{Disguise Magic}, 8th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8AMvNVOUEtxBCDvJ]{Monstrosity Form}

Favored Weapon: dagger

Divine Skill: Deception

Siblings: Sewa and Sumaworo

Temples: monuments, inns, academies

Worshipperst: adventurers, guards, authors

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.X9dkmh23lFwMjrYd]{Ant Haul}, 4th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8M03UxGXjYyDFAoy]{Weapon Storm}, 8th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y2cQYLr5mljDSu1G]{Unrelenting Observation}

Chakisa.name: 查基萨 Chakisa
Chakisa.description:

兄弟姐妹：Wera、Kasa 与 Chira

神殿：海滩、海岸居所、开阔空间

Alignment: CN (CG, N, CN, CE)

Worshipperst: travelers, explorers, epicureans

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Longstrider}, 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3GXU3ugrwLv0P7AH]{Ignite Fireworks}, 4th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]{Fly}

Favored Weapon: hatchet

Divine Ability: Wisdom or Charisma

Divine Skill: Performance

Divine Font: heal

Tova.description:
阵营：LN（LG、LN、LE）

兄弟姐妹：未知

神殿：官僚建筑、法院、卫兵哨站、图书馆

崇拜者：立法者、政治家、建筑师

神圣动物：羊驼

牧师法术：1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rVANhQgB8Uqi9PTl]{Animate Rope}，5环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.m4Mc5XbdML92BKOE]{Strange Geometry}，8环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uEyfLoFQsRKBRIcB]{Scintillating Pattern}

偏好武器：臂铠

神圣能力：智力或感知

神圣技能：社交

神圣泉源：伤害或治疗

关键典范：在你力所能及之处创造秩序体系；遵守所有当地法律，即使只是字面意义上的遵守；为自己创造一套强而有力的道德准则

关键禁忌：明知故犯地违法；在有组织的体系中创造混沌；故意违背社会期望

Alignment: LN (LG, LN, LE)

Siblings: Unknown

Temples: bureaucratic buildings, courts, guard outposts, libraries

Worshipperst: lawmakers, politicians, architects

Sacred Animal: alpaca

Sacred Colors: blue with white

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rVANhQgB8Uqi9PTl]{Animate Rope}, 5th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.m4Mc5XbdML92BKOE]{Strange Geometry}, 8th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uEyfLoFQsRKBRIcB]{Scintillating Pattern}

Favored Weapon: gauntlet

Divine Ability: Intelligence or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Society

Key Edicts: create systems of order wherever you can, obey all local laws even if only to the letter, create for yourself a strong moral code

The Three Stories.name: 三则故事 The Three Stories
The Three Stories.description:
万神殿成员： Jata, Sewa, Sumaworo

阵营： N（LN、N、CN）

领域： 创造、命运、知识、诡计

牧师法术： 1环： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TjWHgXqPv5jywMti]{Pocket Library}，2环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{Mirror Image}，8环： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y2cQYLr5mljDSu1G]{Unrelenting Observation}

偏好武器： 长杖

神圣能力： 智力或感知

神圣技能： 社会

神圣灌注： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

关键典范： 从故事中学习教训与智慧；讲述并写下新的故事；宣告你所发现的一位英雄、骗徒或恶棍

关键禁忌： 无视你自己或他人的故事中迫近毁灭或危险的征兆；在一个正在萌发的故事抵达高潮之前就将其摧毁或使其偏离正轨；在故事中不尊重或脱离你自己的角色

Jata、Sewa与Sumaworo——凡人族群最伟大的三个故事——构成了“平衡之同胞”中唯一非预谋诞生的一支：“三则故事”。追随这一万神殿的凡人往往是说书人和作者，其信念与希德对“元叙事之命运”这一概念的崇拜相近（更多细节参见 Battlezoo Ancestries Sidhe）。

Pantheon Members: Jata, Sewa, Sumaworo

Alignment: N (LN, N, CN)

Domains: creation, fate, knowledge, trickery

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TjWHgXqPv5jywMti]{Pocket Library}, 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{Mirror Image}, 8th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y2cQYLr5mljDSu1G]{Unrelenting Observation}

Favored Weapon: staff

Divine Ability: Intelligence or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Society

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: learn lessons and wisdom from stories, tell and write new tales, proclaim a hero or trickster or villain you find

Key Anathema: ignore the signs of imminent ruin or danger in your own story or those of others, destroy or derail a burgeoning story before it can reach its climax, disrespect or step out of your own role in a story

Jata, Sewa, and Sumaworo, three of the greatest stories of mortalkind, form the only unplanned Siblings of the Balance, the Three Stories. Mortals who follow this pantheon tend to be storytellers and authors with beliefs similar to the sidhe worship of the metanarrative Fate as a concept (see Battlezoo Ancestries Sidhe for more details).

Feast and Famine.name: 盛宴与饥荒 Feast and Famine
Feast and Famine.description:
万神殿成员：埃布鲁格瑟斯、哈瓦斯

阵营：CN（N、CN、CE）

领域：野心、放纵、诡计、财富

牧师法术： 1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.qTr2oCgIXl703Whb]{Thoughtful Gift}，3环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.F9mA2Bg27QKniIdv]{Bottomless Stomach}，6环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}

偏好武器：巨棒

神圣能力：感知或魅力

神圣技能：求生

神圣灌注：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

关键典范：当下吃好但要为拮据时代留些余粮，在能力范围内与他人分享，珍惜你所拥有的：明天它可能就不见了

关键禁忌：过度专注当下而牺牲未来，不必要地浪费资源，弄丢对自己拥有之物的掌握

埃布鲁格瑟斯与哈瓦斯是丰裕与匮乏的兄妹，而将他们的教诲结合为万神殿有两种可设想的方式。“盛宴与饥荒”的“平衡”万神殿以试图在过度与饥荒之间取得平衡、寻找中道的方式来做到这一点；但也有传闻称，哈瓦斯鼓励一种失衡的结合，建议通过过度放纵来制造饥荒，宛如蝗群吞噬其路径上的一切。若确有第二个名为“放纵之失”的万神殿存在，它将秘密运作，并不被“平衡”所接纳；或许那其实是哈瓦斯的一个伪装成第二万神殿的邪教。

Pantheon Members: Ebrugeses, Havath

Alignment: CN (N, CN, CE)

Domains: ambition, indulgence, trickery, wealth

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.qTr2oCgIXl703Whb]{Thoughtful Gift}, 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.F9mA2Bg27QKniIdv]{Bottomless Stomach}, 6th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}

Favored Weapon: greatclub

Divine Ability: Wisdom or Charisma

Divine Skill: Survival

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: eat well now but save some for lean times, share with others within your means, cherish what you have: tomorrow it could be gone

Key Anathema: focus too much on the now at the expense of the future, waste resources needlessly, lose track of what you have

Ebrugeses and Havath are the Siblings of plenty and scarcity, and there are two conceivable ways to combine their teachings into a pantheon. The Balance pantheon of Feast and Famine does so in a way that attempts to balance excess and famine and find a middle path, but rumors exist that Havath encourages an unbalanced combination that recommends overindulging in order to create a famine, like locusts devouring everything in their path. If a second pantheon of Indulgent Loss exists, it operates in secret and isn't accepted as part of the Balance; perhaps it's a cult of Havath masquerading as a second pantheon.

Chira.name: 奇拉 Chira
Chira.description:
阵营: NG (LG, NG, CG, N)

兄弟姐妹: Chakisa、Wera 和 Kasa

神殿: 花店、音乐厅、舞厅、花园

信徒: 花艺师、浪漫主义者、媒人、音乐家

圣兽: 维斯卡查

圣色: 红色和黄色

领域: 创造、家庭、自由、激情

牧师法术: 1环: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.s3abwDbTV43pGFFW]{Shillelagh}, 4环: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D31YX7zvRBvenTAz]{Petal Storm}, 8环: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kWDt0JcKPgX6MvdD]{Burning Blossoms}

偏好武器: 法杖

神圣能力: 敏捷或魅力

神圣技能: 表演

神圣恩赐: 治疗

关键典范: 培育生命与关系、不断成长、以全新的眼光看世界

关键禁忌: 压制一段关系或活的事物的成长、沉湎于旧怨或过错、拒绝接受另一种观点

Alignment: NG (LG, NG, CG, N)

Siblings: Chakisa, Wera, and Kasa

Temples: flower shops, concert halls, ballrooms, gardens

Worshipperst: florists, romantics, matchmakers, musicians

Sacred Animal: viscacha

Sacred Colors: red and yellow

Domains: creation, family, freedom, passion

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.s3abwDbTV43pGFFW]{Shillelagh}, 4th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D31YX7zvRBvenTAz]{Petal Storm}, 8th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kWDt0JcKPgX6MvdD]{Burning Blossoms}

Favored Weapon: staff

Divine Ability: Dexterity or Charisma

Divine Skill: Performance

Divine Font: heal

Key Edicts: nurture life and relationships, keep growing, see the world anew

Key Anathema: stifle the growth of a relationship or a living thing, dwell on old grudges or mistakes, refuse another point of view

The Primordial Energies.name: 原初能量 The Primordial Energies
The Primordial Energies.description:
万神殿成员：Baoyan、Kuu、Mului、Than Dat、Thongfa

阵营：N（NG、LN、N、CN、NE）

领域：空气、大地、火、虚空、水

牧师法术：1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MVrxZarUTnJxAUN8]{系绳}，2环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kMffb6SvhCBMMI4k]{元素区域}，4环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.e36Z2t6tLdW3RUzZ]{元素赋礼}

偏好武器：盾牌凸缘

神圣能力：力量或感知

神圣技能：自然

神圣灌注：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{伤害}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗}

关键典范：在最具潜力时运用每一种太初能量，运用你的力量束缚威胁并保护他人，学习与宇宙的能量同调

关键禁忌：为力量本身而挥使力量，变得依赖某一种能量或方法，释放本应继续封印之物

五位太初能量的手足诞生的目的，是囚禁塔利尔——太初的巨龙神祇，也是双亲的长子。作为万神殿来崇拜太初诸能量的信徒，会尊敬这些能量的整体，尤其尊敬它们在维持塔利尔封印中的角色。

Pantheon Members: Baoyan, Kuu, Mului, Than Dat, Thongfa

Alignment: N (NG, LN, N, CN, NE)

Domains: air, earth, fire, void, water

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MVrxZarUTnJxAUN8]{Tether}, 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kMffb6SvhCBMMI4k]{Elemental Zone}, 4th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.e36Z2t6tLdW3RUzZ]{Elemental Gift}

Favored Weapon: shield boss

Divine Ability: Strength or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Nature

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: employ each of the primordial energies when they have the most potential, use your power to bind threats and protect others, learn to be in tune with the energy of the universe

Key Anathema: wield power for its own sake, become reliant on one type of energy or approach, release that which should remain sealed

The five Siblings of primordial energy were born to imprison Talir, the primordial dragon deity and firstborn of the Parents. Worshippers of the Primordial Energies as a pantheon respect the energies as a whole, especially their role in keeping Talir sealed.

Kasa.name: 斗笠 Kasa
Kasa.description:
阵营： NE（LN、N、LE、NE、CE）

兄弟姐妹： Chakisa、Wera、以及 Chira

神殿：要塞、前哨站、小屋、学校

崇拜者：登山者、生存主义者、北极居民、教师

圣兽：企鹅

圣色：白色配紫色

领域：黑暗、月亮、水、不死

牧师法术： 1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8TQiFzGf4feoHeH0]{Chilling Spray}，4环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kHyjQbibRGPNCixx]{Ice Storm}，7环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vFkz0gVBUT2gGnm1]{Frigid Flurry}

偏好武器：轻型鹤嘴镐

神圣能力：力量或体质

神圣技能：生存

神圣圣泉：伤害

关键典范：为前方挑战做准备、谨慎行事、尊重严酷的寒冷

关键禁忌：把雪与冰视为理所当然、一头扎进危险之中、让重要工作半途而废

Alignment: NE (LN, N, LE, NE, CE)

Siblings: Chakisa, Wera, and Chira

Temples: fortresses, outposts, lodges, schools

Worshipperst: mountaineers, survivalists, arctic inhabitants, teachers

Sacred Animal: penguin

Sacred Colors: white with purple

Domains: darkness, moon, water, undeath

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8TQiFzGf4feoHeH0]{Chilling Spray}, 4th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kHyjQbibRGPNCixx]{Ice Storm}, 7th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vFkz0gVBUT2gGnm1]{Frigid Flurry}

Favored Weapon: light pick

Divine Ability: Strength or Constitution

Divine Skill: Survival

Divine Font: harm

Key Edicts: prepare for challenges ahead, be cautious, respect the harsh cold

Key Anathema: take snow and ice for granted, run headlong into danger, leave important work undone

Dremira.name: 德蕾米拉 Dremira
Dremira.description:
阵营： CN（LG、NG、CG、LN、N、CN）

兄弟姐妹：Awanna 与 Herst

神殿：学校、官僚建筑、育婴所

崇拜者：政治家、革命者、艺术家

神圣动物：乌鸦

神圣颜色：黑色与银色

领域：城市、梦境、命运、隐秘

牧师法术：1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aEM2cttJ2eYcLssW]{Fleet Step}，3环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MNiT0dHol5fEcKlz]{Threefold Aspect}，5环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y0Vy7iNL3ET8K00C]{Dreaming Potential}

偏好武器：手弩

神圣能力：敏捷或感知

神圣技能：通灵学

神圣圣池：治疗

关键典范：学习一个秘密、发明新事物、改变世界

关键禁忌：公开曝光他人的秘密、停滞不前、倒退

Alignment: CN (LG, NG, CG, LN, N, CN)

Siblings: Awanna and Herst

Temples: schools, bureaucratic buildings, nurseries

Worshipperst: politicians, revolutionaries, artists

Sacred Animal: raven

Sacred Colors: black and silver

Domains: cities, dreams, fate, secrecy

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aEM2cttJ2eYcLssW]{Fleet Step}, 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MNiT0dHol5fEcKlz]{Threefold Aspect}, 5th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y0Vy7iNL3ET8K00C]{Dreaming Potential}

Favored Weapon: hand crossbow

Divine Ability: Dexterity or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Occultism

Divine Font: heal

Key Edicts: learn a secret, invent something new, change the world

Key Anathema: Expose someone else's secret publicly, stagnate, regress

The Four Seasons.name: 四季 The Four Seasons
The Four Seasons.description:
万神殿成员：Chakisa、Chira、Kasa、Wera

阵营：N（N）

领域：责任、家庭、月亮、太阳

牧师法术：1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind}，4环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D31YX7zvRBvenTAz]{Petal Storm}，4环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]{Fly}

偏好武器：战扇

神圣能力：力量或感知

神圣技能：生存

神圣灌注：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

关键典范：努力工作以为最坏的情况做准备，帮助他人找到和谐与关系，享受因季节更迭而来的差异

关键禁忌：逃避工作与责任，在他人的关系中制造纷争，让你的急躁把你带入危险

Kasa、Chakisa、Wera与Chira构成了轮转于Alacar世界的四季，也代表了四种截然不同的生命观。作为一个万神殿来崇拜四季的信徒，将这一循环本身视为神圣，并专注于从平衡这些不同生活方式中学到的教训。毕竟，即使是Chakisa与Kasa也能相处得极为融洽，尽管他们（在Kasa的情况下甚至是字面意义上）是极地般的对立。

Pantheon Members: Chakisa, Chira, Kasa, Wera

Alignment: N (N)

Domains: duty, family, moon, sun

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind}, 4th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D31YX7zvRBvenTAz]{Petal Storm}, 4th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]{Fly}

Favored Weapon: fighting fan

Divine Ability: Strength or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Survival

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: work hard to prepare for the worst, help others find harmony and relationships, enjoy the differences that come from the changing of the seasons

Key Anathema: shirk work and responsibility, cause strife in others' relationships, let your impatience lead you into danger

Kasa, Chakisa, Wera, and Chira make up the four seasons that cycle across the world of Alacar, as well as four extremely different outlooks on life. Worshippers of the Four Seasons as a pantheon respect the cycle itself as sacred and focus on the lessons learned from balancing these various lifestyles. After all, even Chakisa and Kasa get along extremely well, despite the fact that they are (literally, in Kasa's case) polar opposites.

Revelry and Restraint.name: 狂欢与克制 Revelry and Restraint
Revelry and Restraint.description:
万神殿成员：阿蒙、卡斯蒂利

阵营：N（NG、N、NE）

领域：自信、自由、放纵、真理

牧师法术：1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.pBevG6bSQOiyflev]{Befuddle}，3环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.DCQHaLrYXMI37dvW]{Paralyze}，8环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GP3wewkQXEPrLxYj]{Subconscious Suggestion}

偏好武器：流星锤

神圣能力：感知或魅力

神圣技能：社交

神圣灌注：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

关键典范：勤勉工作以便之后能休息；教导他人戒律并向他们展示如何放松；危机中保持冷静，有机会时尽情欢庆

关键禁忌：在工作中偷懒；过度劳累把自己逼到精疲力竭；故意破坏氛围（无论是庄重还是庆祝的氛围）

阿蒙与卡斯蒂利一同旅行，并相互制止对方走向极端。狂欢与克制万神殿的信徒知道何时该严肃并勤勉工作，何时该放开束缚、尽情玩乐。

Pantheon Members: Amon, Castilli

Alignment: N (NG, N, NE)

Domains: confidence, freedom, indulgence, truth

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.pBevG6bSQOiyflev]{Befuddle}, 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.DCQHaLrYXMI37dvW]{Paralyze}, 8th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GP3wewkQXEPrLxYj]{Subconscious Suggestion}

Favored Weapon: meteor hammer

Divine Ability: Wisdom or Charisma

Divine Skill: Society

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: work diligently so you can relax later, teach others discipline and show them how to let loose, stay calm in a crisis and exult when you can

Key Anathema: slack off on the job, overwork yourself into burnout, intentionally ruin the mood (whether of dignity or celebration)

Amon and Castilli travel together and keep each other from veering to extremes. Followers of the pantheon of Revelry and Restraint know when to be serious and work diligently and when to let loose and play hard.

Awanna.name: 阿万娜 Awanna
Awanna.description:
阵营： N (LG, NG, CG, LN, N, CN, LE, NE, CE)

兄弟姐妹： Dremira 和 Herst

神殿： 剧院、公园、集市、修道院

神圣能力： 体质或魅力

神圣技能： 社会

神圣灌注： 伤害或治疗

关键典范： 把握当下、尝试新事物、成为最好的自己

关键禁忌： 沉湎过去、浪费时间、拖延

Alignment: N (LG, NG, CG, LN, N, CN, LE, NE, CE)

Siblings: Dremira and Herst

Temples: theaters, parks, market places, monasteries

Worshipperst: merchants, monks, performers

Sacred Animal: hummingbird

Sacred Colors: blue and brown

Domains: ambition, confidence, passion, zeal

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r8g7oSumKOHDqJsd]{Agitate}, 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MNiT0dHol5fEcKlz]{Threefold Aspect}, 5th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OdqM06M0wDUqZWiR]{Cast into Time}

Favored Weapon: club

Divine Ability: Constitution or Charisma

Divine Skill: Society

Divine Font: harm or heal

Key Edicts: seize the day, try something new, be your best self

Key Anathema: dwell on the past, waste time, procrastinate

Herst.name: 赫斯特 Herst
Herst.description:
阵营: LN（LG、LN、N、LE）

兄弟姐妹: Awanna 与 Dremira

神殿: 学院、图书馆、古代遗址、废墟

崇拜者: 历史学家、学者、图书管理员

神圣动物: 猫头鹰

神圣颜色: 米色与黑色

领域: 知识、魔法、守护、警戒

牧师法术: 1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TjWHgXqPv5jywMti]{Pocket Library}，3环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MNiT0dHol5fEcKlz]{Threefold Aspect}，7环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rsZ5c0AUyywe5yoK]{Retrocognition}

偏好武器: 法杖

神圣能力: 智力或感知

神圣技能: 奥术

神圣灌注: 伤害或治疗

关键典范: 保存过去、了解你的历史、寻求知识

关键禁忌: 摧毁记录、否认历史事实、不尊重你的长辈

Alignment: LN (LG, LN, N, LE)

Siblings: Awanna and Dremira

Temples: colleges, libraries, ancient sites, ruins

Worshipperst: historians, scholars, librarians

Sacred Animal: owl

Sacred Colors: beige and black

Domains: knowledge, magic, protection, vigil

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TjWHgXqPv5jywMti]{Pocket Library}, 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MNiT0dHol5fEcKlz]{Threefold Aspect}, 7th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rsZ5c0AUyywe5yoK]{Retrocognition}

Favored Weapon: staff

Divine Ability: Intelligence or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Arcana

Divine Font: harm or heal

Key Edicts: preserve the past, know your history, seek knowledge

Key Anathema: destroy records, deny historical fact, disrespect your elders

Kuu.name: 库乌 Kuu
Kuu.description:
阵营： N（NG、LN、N、CN、NE）

万神殿成员： Aoz, Zoa

阵营： N (NG, N, NE)

牧师法术： 1环： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4c1c6eNzU1PFGkAy]{Endure}，3环： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AMEu5zzLN7uCX645]{Ghostly Weapon}，8环： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Ht35SDf9PDStJfoC]{Spirit Song}

偏好武器： chakram

神授能力： 体质或感知

神授技能： 医学

关键典范： 摧毁不死生物，帮助创造生命，尊重死者及其休息之所

关键禁忌： 创造不死生物，阻止生命繁荣，将死者复生

Aoz 与 Zoa，这对最初的“手足”组合，帮助引导生命与死亡的过程；而生命与死亡的万神殿信徒同等地崇敬这一过程的两半，将一切视为循环——若缺少另一方，则生命或死亡都毫无意义。

Pantheon Members: Aoz, Zoa

Alignment: N (NG, N, NE)

Domains: death, dreams, fate, healing

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4c1c6eNzU1PFGkAy]{Endure}, 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AMEu5zzLN7uCX645]{Ghostly Weapon}, 8th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Ht35SDf9PDStJfoC]{Spirit Song}

Favored Weapon: chakram

Divine Ability: Constitution or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Medicine

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: destroy undead, help create life, respect the dead and their resting place

Key Anathema: create undead, prevent life from flourishing, return the dead to life

Aoz and Zoa, the first pair of Siblings, help shepherd the process of life and death, and pantheists of Life and Death worship both halves of the process equally, seeing everything as a cycle, with either life or death meaningless without the other.

War and Peace.name: 战争与和平 War and Peace
War and Peace.description:
万神殿成员：Semelleh、Zatera

阵营：N（LN、N、CN）

领域：力量、完美、守护、热忱

牧师法术：1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jsWthW1Qy6tg3SwD]{Draw Ire}，3环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}，8环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7]{Maze}

偏好武器：匕首

神圣能力：体质或魅力

神圣技能：交涉或威吓

神圣灌注：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

关键典范：为带来和平而战、为共同守护与胜利建立同盟、在进攻与消极之间折中

关键禁忌：破坏停战协议或同盟、发动不公或不智之战、在退让会导致更多流血时从战斗中退缩

Zatera与Semelleh代表人际与国与国关系的两面。战争与和平万神殿的追随者在二者之间维持平衡：以战争提升稳定并促成和平，同时建立和平同盟以增强战争中的力量。

Pantheon Members: Semelleh, Zatera

Alignment: N (LN, N, CN)

Domains: might, perfection, protection, zeal

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jsWthW1Qy6tg3SwD]{Draw Ire}, 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}, 8th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7]{Maze}

Favored Weapon: dagger

Divine Ability: Constitution or Charisma

Divine Skill: Diplomacy or Intimidation

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}

Key Edicts: fight to bring peace, build alliances for mutual protection and victory, compromise between aggression and passivity

Key Anathema: break truce or alliance, start an unjust or unwise war, back down from a fight when doing so will lead to more bloodshed

Zatera and Semelleh represent both sides of interpersonal and interstate relationships. Followers of the pantheon of War and Peace keep balance between the two, using warfare to increase stability and foster peace while creating peaceful alliances to improve strength in war.
